content:
## Purple Account Eligibility
The Purple Account referral program applies only when the referred customer opens a Purple Account. Its program category is personal_checking, so do not apply these terms to business checking or to another personal checking product.

1. The referrer does not need an account-age waiting period before referring; the required referrer tenure is 0.
2. The referred customer must meet the minimum referred deposit requirement of 1000 for the referral to qualify.
3. The annual referral limit for this account is 6 per referrer.

## Bonus Amounts
Use the Purple Account bonus amounts exactly as listed:

| Recipient | Bonus |
| --- | --- |
| Referrer | 50 |
| Referred customer | 30 |

If the referred deposit is below 1000, neither the referrer bonus nor the referred customer bonus qualifies under these terms.

## Applying The Terms
When a customer compares referral options, keep the Purple Account terms separate from other account programs. See "Personal Checking Referral Programs" for the broader personal checking referral list, and see "Referral Limits And Eligibility" for shared limit and eligibility guidance. Do not substitute the Green Fee Free Account or Blue Account values for a Purple Account referral.
title: Purple Account Referral Terms
